# Scott Opiela

> PE-backed SaaS growth leader behind $3B+ in exits. 3x CMO specializing in demand generation, revenue operations, and high-performance B2B marketing.

## About

Scott Opiela is a 3x Chief Marketing Officer with over 30 years of experience engineering demand systems for high-growth B2B SaaS companies. He has led marketing at Acoustic, CommerceHub, and Autotask, delivering $3B+ in shareholder exits, consistent 10x ARR growth, and marketing programs that drive measurable revenue outcomes. He runs marketing with a focus on leverage, systems, and measurable outcomes, scaling growth efficiently through data and AI.

## Experience

- **Acoustic** (2021-2026): CMO. Led global marketing across brand, product, demand, and operations in a PE-backed SaaS environment. Generated >50% of total ARR pipeline and bookings. Drove brand transformation and repositioning including the launch of Acoustic Connect.
- **CommerceHub** (2018-2021): CMO. Go-to-market strategy, product marketing, and demand generation supporting enterprise growth. Helped position company for multi-billion dollar acquisition by Insight Partners in 2020.
- **Autotask** (2001-2017): CMO. Built scalable demand engine supporting 10x ARR growth to $100M. Delivered >70% marketing-sourced bookings. Contributed to $650M+ in shareholder outcomes across two PE-backed exits (JMI, Vista).

## Areas of Expertise

- B2B SaaS Marketing Strategy
- PE-backed and Private Equity Growth Marketing
- Enterprise Demand Generation
- Revenue Operations and Pipeline
- Go-to-Market Repositioning
- Brand Transformation
- Marketing Performance Frameworks
- AI and Data-Driven Marketing Systems
